title: Next-Gen Lead Management with VAPI Voice AI Assistant and Monday.com

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve developed an amazing new system to better manage our leads and make our processes more efficient using Vapi voice ai assistant. Here’s how it works:

Automated Lead Management with Monday.com

We use Monday.com to keep track of our leads. This saves us time and ensures no lead is missed.

Efficient Communication with VAPI Voice AI

Once leads are in Monday.com, VAPI Voice AI, our smart voice assistant, takes over calling them. The AI bot handles the calls quickly and efficiently, talking to leads just like a human would.

Gathering Insights with Custom Questions

During the call, the AI bot asks custom questions we’ve designed to gather important information. The bot makes sure to ask these questions in a friendly way, making leads feel comfortable and engaged.

Collecting Call Information

After the call, our system gathers all the information, including answers and a full transcript. This helps us understand the lead’s needs and keeps a record of the conversation.

Analyzing with ChatGPT

We then send the call transcript to OpenAI’s ChatGPT, which analyzes the conversation to determine the overall sentiment. This helps us understand how the lead felt during the call.

Sentiment Analysis for Lead Insights

Based on ChatGPT’s analysis, we find out if the call was positive or negative. Positive calls mean the lead had a good experience, while negative calls show areas of concern. This helps us gauge the lead’s interest and satisfaction.

Updating Lead Information

Finally, we update the lead in Monday.com with all the gathered details, including the call transcript and sentiment analysis. This ensures we have a complete and up-to-date record, helping us plan our next steps.

By using this innovative system, we manage our leads more effectively, understand their needs better, and improve our processes. This boosts our efficiency and helps us build stronger relationships with our leads.
